verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 13.05m matches only the regional CRM-qualified pipeline (13.053m), which that document explicitly states is 'not ranked against Finance'; the authoritative Finance restatement (v2, approved 15 July 2026) gives 13.510m for the same Q2 2026 qualified pipeline, and the Quarterly Update gives 13.26m. Multiple competing values exist with no established authority ordering, so neither the matching regional figure nor the conflicting Finance figure can be treated as definitive.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the regional CRM pipeline (13.053m) against the Finance-qualified pipeline (13.510m restated; 13.26m in the Quarterly Update) to determine which figure the master document should report, and confirm the intended measurement basis before finalizing the claim.
